But this is not true in general, because `deriv (interpolated x y f)` is the derivative of `f ‚ąė interpolator x y` as a function `‚ĄĚ ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ`, which is `f'((1 - t) ‚ÄĘ x + t ‚ÄĘ y) ‚ÄĘ (y - x)` (where `f'` is the derivative of `f` at `(1 - t) ‚ÄĘ x + t ‚ÄĘ y` and `‚ÄĘ` is the directional derivative).
